name: Nevada Legislature
notes: Legislative meeting calendar and archived video should be treated as source-backed but structurally different from city agenda platforms.

name: Governor / Executive Boards
notes: Executive board records are distributed across appointed boards; use this as a registry seed until board-specific sources are added.

name: Carson City Board of Supervisors
notes: City meeting page exposes agendas, packets, minutes, motion records, and videos.

name: Reno City Council
notes: Reno uses a PrimeGov/Granicus public portal for agendas and meeting records.

name: Sparks City Council
notes: Agenda and minutes archive appears as city-hosted HTML/document links.

name: Washoe County Commission
notes: Legistar source should eventually provide structured agenda items and vote records.

name: Elko City Council
notes: City uses a public OnBase agenda portal plus city-hosted agenda/minutes and video archive pages. Treat as HTML/manual until an OnBase-specific adapter is promoted.

name: Elko County Commission
notes: County meeting page links agendas, minutes, videos, and Granicus archives for the elected five-member commission.

name: Clark County Commission
notes: County page links agendas while Legistar is the structured meeting system.

name: Las Vegas City Council
notes: PrimeGov portal seed for agenda and packet discovery.

name: Henderson City Council
notes: Public meeting agendas page is the first-stage discovery target.

name: North Las Vegas City Council
notes: City page points to a PrimeGov portal for meeting records.

name: Washoe County School District Board of Trustees
notes: School district calendar and archive are HTML first-stage sources.

name: Clark County School District Board of Trustees
notes: BoardDocs support belongs in the later automated scraper phase; keep as HTML/manual source until then.

name: Carson City School District Board of Trustees
notes: District page plus BoardDocs archive seed.

name: Nevada System of Higher Education Board of Regents
notes: Regents pages include upcoming meetings and archives with agenda materials.
